response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is overwhelmingly in full-stack web and mobile development, with minimal evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite some low-level DLang and C++ exposure.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in diverse projects
Proven ability to deliver complex systems and optimize performance in high-throughput environments
concerns: No demonstrable experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS, but no evidence of 8+ years in hardware/performance-critical domains as required
